{
  "project": "TraderFrame — Evidence Gate",
  "stage": "Performance Review",
  "objective": "Review shader and particle cost to ensure a premium, fluid 60 FPS experience on target devices (desktop and high-end mobile browsers) while maintaining visual fidelity and brand principles.",
  "target_specifications": {
    "target_frame_rate": "60 FPS",
    "apis_supported": ["WebGL 2.0", "WebGPU"],
    "target_hardware": "Modern mid-tier integrated GPUs (e.g., Intel Iris Xe, Apple M1) and discrete GPUs",
    "max_gpu_memory_allocation_mb": 120.0
  },
  "shader_profiles": [
    {
      "shader_name": "Evidence Gate Hologram",
      "type": "Vertex & Fragment (Custom Material)",
      "description": "Visualizes the filtering boundary where raw market data is challenged and validated. Uses procedural scanlines, fresnel glow, and dynamic grid distortion.",
      "metrics": {
        "vertex_instructions": 42,
        "fragment_instructions": 118,
        "texture_samplers": 1,
        "uniforms": 8,
        "overdraw_risk": "Medium"
      },
      "performance_analysis": "The procedural 3D Simplex noise used for the gate's organic distortion was causing fragment shader bottlenecks on mobile devices. Fragment instruction count was initially 180.",
      "optimization_actions": [
        "Replaced procedural 3D Simplex noise with a pre-baked 2D seamless noise texture LUT (Look-Up Table) packed into the red channel of a utility map.",
        "Implemented cheap mathematical approximations for the Fresnel factor instead of using heavy pow() functions.",
        "Moved static coordinate calculations from the fragment shader to the vertex shader, interpolating them across the surface."
      ],
      "status": "Optimized & Approved"
    },
    {
      "shader_name": "Risk Boundary Field",
      "type": "Vertex Displacement & Fragment",
      "description": "A dynamic, transparent 3D shell representing the risk threshold enclosing the decision space. Glows and ripples when evidence challenges risk parameters.",
      "metrics": {
        "vertex_instructions": 64,
        "fragment_instructions": 45,
        "texture_samplers": 0,
        "uniforms": 6,
        "overdraw_risk": "High (due to transparency and overlapping layers)"
      },
      "performance_analysis": "High fill-rate cost when the camera gets close to or inside the boundary shell, causing severe overdraw on high-DPI screens.",
      "optimization_actions":
 [
        "Implemented camera-distance fading
